final_prompt.prompt:
Create a realistic employee ID badge design for "字节跳动" (ByteDance), showing both front and back sides.

Style/medium: needs a realistic, physical-object photography aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include both front and back sides of the badge displayed together
Subject: must include a corporate employee ID badge for "字节跳动"
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean, professional backdrop — exact surface and setting are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a realistic product-photography atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a realistic hard plastic card surface with lanyard hole — exact finish (matte/gloss) is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "字节跳动" on the badge
Constraints: must show both front and back faces of the badge clearly
Avoid:
